You see the familyname Windtrouser engraved on this brooch.
This cyclopean hammer seems to be an awesome smithing tool.
It looks like a little king.
You have a vague feeling that it looks somewhat silly.
You have a vague feeling that it looks somewhat silly.
I braved the Annihilator and all I got is this lousy teddy bear.
It seems to be burning from inside.
This is a bill for an expensive magicians hat and several rabbits.
This bag is nearly bursting from all the letters inside.
This item seems to be a single part of a bigger object.
This item seems to be a single part of a bigger object.
This item seems to be a single part of a bigger object.
This item seems to be a single part of a bigger object.
This item seems to have several parts missing.

This item seems to be a single part of a bigger object.
The gem of the helmet is burned out and should be replaced.
The gem is glowing with power.
It is the djinn leader's sleeping lamp.
Recover your EXP from last death.
It contains several exotic recipes.
This rune vibrates with ancient powers. It seems to be rotting rapidly.
The blue crystal is softly humming a ghostly melody. It seems to be rotting rapidly.
It was once part of a formidable two handed weapon. It seems to be rotting rapidly.
This ritual weapon was forged from the sharp fang of a giant cobra. It seems to be rotting rapidly.
This arrow seems not suitable for the use with ordinary bows. It seems to be rotting rapidly.
It is still beating with unholy life. It seems to be rotting rapidly.
This ancient relic shows signs of untold age. It seems to be rotting rapidly.
It is the djinn leader's sleeping lamp.
It is the djinn leader's sleeping lamp.
It is the magic Cyclopmania Sword.
It is the magic Cyclopmania Sword.
It is the magic Cyclopmania Sword.
The blade is a magic flame.
The blade is a magic flame.
The blade is a magic flame.
This sword has been forged by ancient giants.
This sword has been forged by ancient giants.
This sword has been forged by ancient giants.
A deadly but fragile weapon.
A deadly but fragile weapon.
It is the Sword of Valor.
The blade shimmers in light blue.
The blade shimmers in light blue.
Strong powers flow in this magic sword.
Strong powers flow in this magic sword.
The extraordinary sharp blade penetrates every armor.
The extraordinary sharp blade penetrates every armor.
A masterpiece of a dwarven smith.
A masterpiece of a dwarven smith.
It may come in handy sometime
It is blessed by the gods of Tibia.
You feel an aura of protection.
You feel an aura of protection.
You feel the power of this mighty axe.
The blade is a magic flame.
Temporary magic powers enchant this staff.
The staff longs for death.
The staff longs for magic.
The staff longs for death.
A giant is said to have forged this hammer to take revenge for the death of his brother.
It has been reinforced with iron.
It apparently originally belonged to some lesser undead.
It apparently originally belonged to some lesser undead.
Its tip is made of extremely solid steel.
It is enchanted with ancient magic that renders a weak staff into a powerful weapon.
It's an enchanted armor.
It's an enchanted armor.
It is the famous Helmet of the Stars.
It is the famous Helmet of the Stars.
It is the famous Helmet of the Stars.
It is the famous Armor of the Stars.
It is the Helmet of Hermes.
It is the Helmet of Hermes.
It is the Helmet of Hermes.
You hear an evil whispering from the inside.
An excellent masterpiece of a smith.
An excellent masterpiece of a smith.
It is made of dragon scales.
It is an enchanted shield.
It is an enchanted shield.
It is an enchanted shield.
A mighty shield warded by the gods of Tibia.
This powerful shield seems to be as light as air.
This powerful shield.
The shield is made of dragon scales.
The shield is made of dragon scales.
The shield grants divine protection.
Many gems sparkle on the shield.
Many gems sparkle on the shield.
An unholy creature covers the shield.
Dark powers enchant this shield.
This shield feels warm to the touch.
The robe is artfully embroideredy.
The robe is artfully embroideredy.
It is a magic robe.
It is a red magic robe. (+7% Fire Protect)
It is a magic robe.
Something is strange about this turban.
This hat is the insignia of all tibian post officers.
It still contains a small part of the power of a dragon.
It is not mature yet.

It's a lumberjack's working place.
Use it in your house to construct a wooden chair.
Use it in your house to construct a sofa chair.
Use it in your house to construct a red cushioned chair.
Use it in your house to construct a green cushioned chair.
Use it in your house to construct a tusk chair.
Use it in your house to construct an ivory chair.
Use it in your house to construct a trunk chair.
Use it in your house to construct a small table.
Use it in your house to construct a ferumbras dummy.
Use it in your house to construct a square table.
Use it in your house to construct a round table.
Use it in your house to construct a coal basin.
Use it in your house to construct a stone table.
Use it in your house to construct a tusk table.

Use it in your house to construct a dresser.
Use it in your house to construct a pendulum clock.

Use it in your house to construct a globe.
Use it in your house to construct a table lamp.
Use it in your house to construct a rocking chair.
Use it in your house to construct a piano.
Use it in your house to construct a knight statue.
Use it in your house to construct a minotaur statue.
Use it in your house to construct a large amphora.
Use it in your house to construct a goblin statue.
Use it in your house to reveal an indoor plant.
Use it in your house to construct a barrel.
Use it in your house to reveal a christmas tree.
Use it in your house to construct a rocking horse.
Use it in your house to construct a telescope.
Use it in your house to construct a bamboo drawer.
Use it in your house to construct a trough.
Use it in your house to construct a trunk.

It is melting rapidly.
It is pulsating with spectral energy.
It is blank.
It contains some strange symbols of the lizard language.
It contains a collection of beautiful elven poems.
It might come in handy in cold regions.
It is covered with strange numbers.
It contains the ashes of a lizard high priest.
It is filled with the blood of the snake god.
It is empty.

It is empty.

they are helmets crafted with elven miners for the Red rose order.
it is the tiara of a princess, I feel an enormous energy in this object..
Infinite Regen: 2hp/s 2mp/s.
It is a ring created by humans especially for distance fights.
This love ring is powerful. 1000 MP and 1000 HP when use it. (Cooldown: 5 min)
these blue pants were developed by an ancient wizard, they offer agility and do not weigh.
these red pants were developed by an ancient wizard, they offer agility and do not weigh.
It's the sword of Dante, slayer of demons, it is said that she is able to open the gate with the world of darkness.
This giant sword of fire deals high damage and burns..
it was forged in magic metal, it is an extremely light sword and with a cut it can even hurt demons.
it's the highest honor you can earn from a gamemaster.
It can be used to enchant items at the town forge.
within this gem lies enormous power.
this gem is so hot, when you hold it it's like there are flames burning inside.
it is the gem of space, it should not be found, its power is too great to be controlled.
it is said that whoever controls this gem can predict the future.
it is said that whoever controls this gem can predict the future.

This sword has legendary.
It is the supreme helmet of black demons.
Mans best friend, forged in gold, is a priceless reward given only by gamemasters.
It's a demon egg.
It's a hydra egg.
It's a giant spider egg.
It is the Boots of Hermes.
it is a statue to honor the new rookgaard players..
it is a more powerful magic wall than normal.
it's a magic wall with a wall of fire, that's old magic.
It is a statue in honor of the Black Demons.

It is the lendary silver mace.

This nifty gadget can be used for many vital and less vital purposes. If it's not jammed, that is.
Use to get 10 premium points!
Use to remove red skull (this item remove only red skull, the frags still).
Use to get 100 premium points!
Use it to get 1 hour of 20% of extra EXP. To check your time left use the command: !exp

Infinite spear.
Barbarian women are said to use it for conjuring beasts.
This axe is only granted to a greenhorn of the Svargrond Arena.
Made from a mammoth's legbones, it is one of the favored weapons among barbarians.
This sword is only granted to a scrapper of the Svargrond arena.
Its blade is very notchy.
This axe is only granted to a scrapper of the Svargrond arena.
The beautiful jewel on the top of this scepter is sharp enough to cut through glass.
This axe is only granted to a scrapper of the Svargrond Arena.
This sword is only granted to a warlord of the Svargrond Arena.
This club is only granted to a greenhorn of the Svargrond arena.
This sword is only granted to a greenhorn of the Svargrond arena.
Floating stones form the tip of this strange weapon, held in place by unspeakable magic.
This club is only granted to a scrapper of the Svargrond arena.
This weapon has to be swung in both hands and requires a lot of strength.
Only those who have descended to the deepest depths may wield this hammer without it cursing them.
This weapon has to be swung in both hands and requires a lot of strength.
This club is only granted to a warlord of the Svargrond arena.
Small flames are dancing around this strange weapon.
This axe is only granted to a warlord of the Svargrond arena.
A beautiful gem is embedded in this weapon.
This beautifully ornamented bow was made by a skilled elvish bowmaker.
These boots keep your toes warm in even the iciest regions, but they feel kind of heavy.
It feels nice and warm on your ears.
It is imbued with protective magic.
They offer little protection but will at least provide some comfort and warmth.
There is a dark aura surrounding it.
The soft tissue shimmers.
It is covered with runic symbols.
The smooth tissue seems to sparkle.
It shows your spells and can also shield against attacks when worn.
It shows your spells and can also shield against attacks when worn.
It shows your spells and can also shield against attacks when worn.
It shows your spells and can also shield against attacks when worn.
It shows your spells and can also shield against attacks when worn.
Strange elemental magic flows over this shield.
It has been temporarily imbued with fire magic and boosts your shielding skill.
It has been temporarily imbued with ice magic and has a greatly increased shielding value.
It has been temporarily imbued with energy magic and increases your speed.
It has been temporarily imbued with earth magic and boosts your regeneration.
It shows your spells and can also shield against attacks when worn.
It belonged once to a pirate.
It belonged once to a pirate.
It belonged once to a pirate.
They are the pride of the paladin guild.
It contains pure fighting spirit.
It contains the sweat spilled in many battles and is said to be used for certain perfumes too.
It is made from fine spider silk.
Even the king would be proud to wear an armour made of this refined steel.
This rare metal must have been refined in the depths of Tibia.
An armour made of this steel is said to protect against fiery dragon breath.
Some thousands of these would probably make an extremely comfortable pillow.
It is said to make your feet fly.
Collectors all around the world crave for this item.
It once belonged to a mighty creature of the deep.
You could swear it just winked at you.
Sun can be a merciless killer, but so can you.
It reeks of hatred and malice.
A hermit near Carlin might be able to tell you more about it.
Sharp and light, this is a useful tool for tanners, doctors and assassins.
It is quite fashionable as well as useful for anyone spending huge amounts of time in the sun.
It is the claw of Demodras.
The words 'Ramsay the Reckless' are engraved inside. It appears to be cracked and broken.
It holds a sample of the rare griffinclaw flower.
It has the letter 'C' carved into one of the teeth.
It is a simple wooden stake.
Many mighty priests of Tibia have blessed this stake.
This strange object seems to be made of half spirit, half metal. It is unknown to most smiths.
It once belonged to a mermaid.
'For Elane, with Love' is engraved on it.
It is covered with foreign symbols.
It has not been used yet.
You were lucky! Go claim your prize at the potion store in Edron.
It tickles your neck in a rather pleasant way and absorbs loads of damage.
Its leaves stretch out to cover your whole body if you receive earth damage.
It holds the last breath of Leviathan.
This chess box is made of jade and obsidian. It will hold a full set of 32 Zaoan chess figures.
Something is wobbling inside. Maybe with a fishing rod you could reach it.
This holy blade was forged of shattered dreams.
It is a bit heavy due to the iron mounting, but very precise.
It is a bit heavy due to the iron mounting, but very precise.
Used for crafting.
Used for crafting.
Used for crafting.
Used for crafting.
Used for crafting.
Used for crafting.
Very useful item. If you can, keep it.
Combine 100 pieces into 1 Mystic Ore.
Its a decent pickaxe.
Its the best current mining pickaxe.
Its the worst mining pickaxe.

Change this book for a training staff, bow, club, axe or sword. Ex.: !staff !bow !club...
This item heals your HP/Mana by 100% (Cooldown: 120s)
